name: Samsung Galaxy S23
description: Samsung Galaxy S23 flagship smartphone with Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 processor and Dynamic AMOLED display.

reviews.title: Fantastic Android flagship
reviews.review_text: The performance is extremely smooth and the display is gorgeous. Cameras perform great in daylight and low light.

name: Apple MacBook Air M2
description: Ultra-thin Apple laptop powered by the M2 chip with incredible battery life.

name: Sony Bravia X75K 55-inch 4K Smart TV
description: Sony 55-inch 4K Ultra HD Smart TV with Google TV and Dolby Audio.

name: LG 260L Double Door Refrigerator
description: Energy efficient double door refrigerator with Smart Inverter Compressor.

name: IFB 8kg Front Load Washing Machine
description: Fully automatic front load washing machine with AI wash technology.

name: Daikin 1.5 Ton Inverter Split AC
description: Energy efficient inverter AC with fast cooling and PM2.5 filter.

name: Apple iPad Air (5th Gen)
description: Powerful tablet with Apple M1 chip and 10.9-inch Liquid Retina display.

name: Sony PlayStation 5
description: Next generation gaming console with ultra fast SSD and ray tracing.

name: Apple Watch Series 9
description: Advanced smartwatch with health monitoring and fitness tracking.

name: Sony Alpha A7 IV Mirrorless Camera
description: Professional mirrorless camera with 33MP full-frame sensor.

name: Apple iPhone 15
description: Apple iPhone 15 with A16 Bionic chip, 48MP main camera, Dynamic Island, and a 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR display.
highlights: 48MP Main Camera with advanced computational photography
A16 Bionic chip for fast performance
Dynamic Island for alerts and activities
USB-C connectivity for charging and accessories

reviews.title: Excellent camera and performance
reviews.review_text: Upgraded from iPhone 12 and the difference is huge. The 48MP camera captures amazing details and the phone feels extremely fast.

reviews.title: Great phone but slightly expensive
reviews.review_text: Display quality and build are excellent. Dynamic Island is actually useful. Price feels a bit high for the base storage.

name: Apple iPhone 15 Pro Max
description: iPhone 15 Pro Max with A17 Pro chip, titanium design, 5x optical zoom telephoto, and Action Button.

reviews.title: The best iPhone ever made
reviews.review_text: Titanium feels premium and lighter than expected. 5x zoom is phenomenal for travel photography. A17 Pro handles everything effortlessly.

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra with Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, built-in S Pen, 200MP quad camera, and titanium frame.
highlights: Titanium frame with Gorilla Glass Armor

reviews.title: 200MP camera is absolutely insane
reviews.review_text: 100x Space Zoom captures details you wouldn't believe. S Pen is great for note-taking. Galaxy AI features are genuinely useful daily.

name: Samsung Galaxy S24
description: Samsung Galaxy S24 with Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 50MP triple camera, 6.2-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X, and Galaxy AI features.
highlights: Galaxy AI with Circle to Search

reviews.title: Best compact Android flagship
reviews.review_text: Galaxy AI features are genuinely useful. Camera quality rivals iPhone and the display is gorgeous. Perfect size for one-hand use.

name: OnePlus 12
description: OnePlus 12 with Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, Hasselblad-tuned 50MP triple camera, and 100W SUPERVOOC fast charging.

reviews.title: 100W charging in 26 minutes is unreal
reviews.review_text: 100W charging fills the phone from 0 to 100 in 26 mins. Hasselblad camera colours are natural and accurate. Great display.

name: Google Pixel 9 Pro
description: Google Pixel 9 Pro with Tensor G4 chip, 50MP triple camera with 5x telephoto, and Gemini AI built-in.
highlights: Gemini AI built-in across all apps
7 years of OS and security updates

reviews.title: Gemini AI integration is a game changer
reviews.review_text: Gemini integration is seamless across all apps. 7 years of updates is a major selling point for long-term value.

name: Xiaomi 14 Ultra
description: Xiaomi 14 Ultra with Leica quad camera featuring 1-inch Sony LYT-900 sensor and Snapdragon 8 Gen 3.
highlights: Leica quad camera with 1-inch Sony LYT-900 sensor

reviews.title: 1-inch Leica sensor is in a class of its own
reviews.review_text: The 1-inch sensor captures light like a compact camera. Leica authentic color modes produce jaw-dropping portrait shots. Best camera phone right now.

name: Nothing Phone (2a)
description: Nothing Phone (2a) with unique Glyph Interface, Dimensity 7200 Pro, and a 6.7-inch AMOLED display.
highlights: Unique Glyph Interface LED lighting system

reviews.title: Most unique phone in its price range
reviews.review_text: Glyph Interface is not just a gimmick - genuinely useful for call alerts. Great performance at this price point.

name: Realme GT 6T
description: Realme GT 6T with Snapdragon 7+ Gen 3, 120W SUPERVOOC, 6.78-inch AMOLED 120Hz, and 50MP OIS camera.

reviews.title: Best value phone under 30k
reviews.review_text: 120W charging fills the 5500mAh battery in about 25 minutes. Snapdragon 7+ Gen 3 handles gaming flawlessly. Excellent value.

name: Motorola Razr 50 Ultra
description: Motorola Razr 50 Ultra flip foldable with Snapdragon 8s Gen 3, large 4-inch external cover screen, and 50MP cameras.

reviews.title: Best flip phone for daily use
reviews.review_text: Large cover screen means I rarely open the phone. Fashion-forward design gets compliments. Camera quality is excellent for a foldable.

name: Vivo X100 Pro
description: Vivo X100 Pro with Dimensity 9300, ZEISS APO telephoto, 50MP triple camera, and 100W FlashCharge.

reviews.title: ZEISS APO telephoto is cinematic quality
reviews.review_text: APO lens eliminates chromatic aberration completely. Portrait shots have a creamy bokeh like a professional lens. One of the best camera phones.

name: ASUS ROG Phone 8 Pro
description: ASUS ROG Phone 8 Pro gaming smartphone with Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 overclocked, 165Hz AMOLED, and Aero Sensor.
highlights: Rear Aero touch sensors for gaming

reviews.title: Absolute beast for mobile gaming
reviews.review_text: 165Hz display makes gaming smoother than anything else. Overclocked Snapdragon never throttles. AeroActive Cooler keeps temperatures in check.

name: Redmi Note 13 Pro+
description: Redmi Note 13 Pro+ with 200MP OIS camera, Dimensity 7200 Ultra, 120W HyperCharge, and IP68 at incredible value.

reviews.title: 200MP and IP68 under 35k - unreal value
reviews.review_text: 200MP camera detail is mind-blowing. 120W charges fully in 20 minutes. IP68 on a budget phone is exceptional. Best value phone in India.

name: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 6
description: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 6 with Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 7.6-inch foldable display, S Pen support, and Galaxy AI.

reviews.title: The future of smartphones is here
reviews.review_text: Using two apps side by side on the large display is a productivity game-changer. Galaxy AI on fold is incredibly useful. Build quality is greatly improved.

name: POCO X6 Pro 5G
description: POCO X6 Pro 5G with Dimensity 8300-Ultra, 64MP triple camera, 6.67-inch AMOLED 144Hz, and 67W fast charging.

reviews.title: Gaming performance is unmatched under 25k
reviews.review_text: Dimensity 8300-Ultra benchmarks higher than last-gen flagships. 144Hz AMOLED is buttery smooth. Liquid cooling keeps temps in check during gaming.

name: Apple iPhone SE (3rd Generation)
description: Apple iPhone SE 3rd gen with A15 Bionic chip, 5G, and the classic 4.7-inch Touch ID form factor at an affordable price.
highlights: A15 Bionic chip - same as iPhone 13

reviews.title: Best small iPhone for those who hate large screens
reviews.review_text: Finally a phone I can use with one hand. A15 Bionic is incredibly fast. Perfect for elderly parents or people who prefer simplicity.

name: OnePlus Nord CE 4
description: OnePlus Nord CE 4 with Snapdragon 7 Gen 3, 100W SUPERVOOC, 6.7-inch AMOLED 120Hz at a mid-range price.

reviews.title: 100W charging on a budget phone is incredible
reviews.review_text: 100W charging at this price point is remarkable. Clean OxygenOS is refreshing. AMOLED display is vivid and great for media consumption.

name: Samsung Galaxy A55 5G
description: Samsung Galaxy A55 5G with Exynos 1480, IP67 protection, 50MP OIS triple camera, and 5000mAh battery.

reviews.title: Best mid-range Samsung with premium features
reviews.review_text: IP67 protection at this price is impressive. OIS camera produces stable videos. 5 years of OS updates is a major long-term selling point.

name: OPPO Find X7 Ultra
description: OPPO Find X7 Ultra with Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, dual periscope Hasselblad cameras, and 100W SUPERVOOC charging.

reviews.title: Dual periscope telephoto is unmatched
reviews.review_text: Having both 3x and 6x periscope cameras is a revelation. Every zoom level is sharp with excellent Hasselblad colour science.

name: Samsung Galaxy S23 FE
description: Samsung Galaxy S23 FE with Snapdragon 8 Gen 1, 50MP triple camera, IP68, and 4500mAh battery with 25W charging.

reviews.title: Great fan edition - flagship chip at mid-range price
reviews.review_text: Flagship Snapdragon chipset at mid-range price is excellent value. IP68 rating is premium. Camera output is solid. Display is gorgeous.
